title: Outliers: actual vs expected lifespan for body size (years)

source.name: AnAge Database / Naked mole rat research (University of Rochester)
source.publisher: Human Ageing Genomic Resources / Buffenstein Lab

notes: Illustrative; comparing actual max lifespan to expected lifespan for the same body mass based on mammalian scaling laws. Naked mole rat lives ~10x longer than a mouse of the same size.
